creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Tue Mar 25 20:11:48 2014
New Revision: 349187
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/349187
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r349187/

Log:
  - Update to 1.13.2
  - Add PORTSCOUT restriction to avoid beta builds
  
  PR:		ports/187933
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com>

Modified:
  head/games/doomsday/Makefile
  head/games/doomsday/distinfo
  head/games/doomsday/pkg-plist

Modified: head/games/doomsday/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/doomsday/Makefile	Tue Mar 25 20:06:43 2014	(r349186)
+++ head/games/doomsday/Makefile	Tue Mar 25 20:11:48 2014	(r349187)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	doomsday
-PORTVERSION=	1.12.2
+PORTVERSION=	1.13.2
 CATEGORIES=	games
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/deng/Doomsday%20Engine/${PORTVERSION}
 
@@ -38,6 +38,8 @@ OPENAL_USES=	openal:al
 OPENAL_QMAKE_ON=	CONFIG+=deng_openal
 OPENAL_QMAKE_OFF=	CONFIG+=deng_noopenal
 
+PORTSCOUT=	limit:^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$
+
 post-patch:
 	${REINPLACE_CMD} 's,share/man,man,' \
 		${PATCH_WRKSRC}/doomsday/client/client.pro \

==============================================================================

+SIZE (doomsday-1.13.2.tar.gz) = 13537973
